title: Quorum Agent Definition
description: Declarative agent definition aligned with Azure Assistants API format + Google A2A Agent Card for cross-agent discovery. Static identity — runtime state lives in Supabase (local) or Azure thread store (prod).

name.description: Human-readable agent name. Maps to Azure Assistants 'name'.

description.description: One-line description. Maps to Azure Assistants 'description' and A2A Agent Card 'description'.

instructions.description: The agent's core system prompt. Maps directly to Azure Assistants 'instructions' field. Defines personality, responsibilities, and behavioral guidelines.

domain_tags.description: Snake_case tags for affinity scoring. Stored in Azure Assistants 'metadata'. Agents with overlapping tags discover each other.

authority_rank.description: Higher rank overrides lower on conflict. 1=advisory, 5=standard, 8=senior, 10=orchestrator. Stored in Azure Assistants 'metadata'.

model.description: LLM model identifier. Maps to Azure Assistants 'model'. Use 'gpt-4o-mini' for standard turns, 'gpt-4o' for complex reasoning.

tools.description: Tool definitions in Azure Assistants format. Each tool has type='function' with a function spec.

auto_create_docs.description: Whether this agent can create new documents without human approval.

escalation_model.description: Model used for A2A negotiations and escalations.

metadata.description: Custom metadata. Maps to Azure Assistants 'metadata' (max 16 key-value pairs). Quorum-specific fields stored here.

a2a.description: Google A2A protocol Agent Card fields for cross-agent discovery.

assistant_id.description: Azure AI Assistant ID. Populated on first deployment by deploy script.

thread_id.description: Azure thread ID for current session. Populated at runtime.
